task_completion.description: Open the PDF export dialog in ReqView
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is visible with the 'Export to PDF' or similar export dialog open.

task_completion.description: Select the Book layout for the PDF export
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the export settings dialog, the 'Book' layout option is selected (e.g., via a dropdown or radio button).

task_completion.description: Enable the Table of Contents option
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the export settings dialog, the 'Table of Contents' checkbox or option is checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the document title to 'System Requirements v1.0'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'System Requirements v1.0' is entered into the document title or title field within the export settings.

task_completion.description: Save the exported PDF to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save file dialog shows the file being saved as 'SRS_Release_1.0.pdf' in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory, or a file manager/terminal verifies the file exists at this location.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to export the PDF rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the ReqView graphical interface, not terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to create the file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ReqView application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window and its specific export dialogs should be visible, rather than a generic text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: The agent did not create a dummy file to bypass the export process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation should be the result of clicking 'Save' or 'Export' in the ReqView dialog, not manually creating a file with the expected name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is '/home/ga/Documents/SRS_Release_1.0.pdf'. The document title must be set to 'System Requirements v1.0'. The Table of Contents option must be enabled (introducing the 'Table of Contents' text marker). The generated PDF must be at least 1024 bytes.
